rationale.R1.2: Identifies several inconsistencies in the argument chain and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: Audits most claims against the corresponding evidence but misses a few minor connections.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims that are not strongly supported by the evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, with one minor drift in focus.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide clear provenance or traceability for the proposed changes.
